_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: exposure to hyperoxia from P7 to P12 increased central vessel dropout area and enhanced neovascularization in Nf1+/− mice at P17 when compared with WT mice
details: Increased central vessel dropout area and enhanced neovascularization in oxygen-induced retinopathy model at P17
